# aikido_webhook (Resource)

Manages a webhook in Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Notify Slack when a new issue is found
resource "aikido_webhook" "new_issues" {
  target_url = "https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/yyy/zzz"
  event_type = "issue.open.created"
}

# Alert on Zen attacks
resource "aikido_webhook" "attacks" {
  target_url = "https://hooks.slack.com/services/xxx/yyy/zzz"
  event_type = "zen.attack"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `event_type` (String) The event type that triggers the webhook.
- `target_url` (String) The target URL for the webhook.

### Read-Only

- `health_status` (String) The health status of the webhook: `unknown`, `failing`, or `success`.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the webhook.
- `latest_http_status_code` (Number) The HTTP status code from the latest webhook delivery.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import a webhook by its ID
terraform import aikido_webhook.new_issues "123"
```
